note: Candela uses gear slots (3 per character). Tier 1: standard gear (free), Tier 2: special gear (costs gear slot), Tier 3-4: artifacts (powerful, bleed-related costs).

2.name: Cassandra's Enchanting Perfume
2.effect: +1 Sway, -1 Hide for next 6 hours. 5 uses.

2.name: Dr. Malcolm's Alchemical Reference Guide
2.effect: +1 Focus on rolls that have to do with alchemy or magick.

2.name: Elio's Brass Knuckles
2.effect: When rolling Strike, take a Body mark to add +1d.

2.name: Esther's Spy Glass
2.effect: Can roll Survey from much farther away.

2.name: Mechanical Glove
2.effect: When rolling Control, take a Brain mark to add +1d.

2.name: Phosphenes' Lights
2.effect: Handheld illuminators that produce a glow only the holder can see.

2.name: Porcelain Pills
2.effect: Take 1 Body mark to soak 1 Bleed mark. 3 uses.

2.name: Taylor House Coffee
2.effect: +1 Move, -1 Control for next 6 hours. 3 uses.

3.name: Ascendant's Assistant
3.effect: A holy symbol of the Divine Herald. +1 Sway and +1 Sense, take 1 Bleed for every roll with a 3 or less as its result.

3.name: Chains of Protection
3.effect: A pair of bracelets that allow the wearers to take any marks meant for the person wearing the other.

3.name: Copper Spirit Board
3.effect: Creates a connection beyond the veil. Take 1 Bleed and roll Sense. Mixed success: one question. Full success: three.

3.name: Ellington's Rifle
3.effect: Less recoil, smooth shot. When rolling Control to shoot this gun, take a Bleed mark to get +2d.

3.name: The Grim Radio
3.effect: When plugged into a dead body, hear the voice of the dead. Roll Sense. Mixed: one question. Full: three. One use per body.

3.name: Lady Grace's Amethyst Pendant
3.effect: Draws eyes away from one's faults. When rolling Sway, take a Bleed mark to get +2d.

3.name: Masks of the Recluse
3.effect: Recovered from the spider-creature. Assume the face and voice of a different person. Take a Bleed mark when put on and when removed.

4.name: The Petrified Pendulum
4.effect: Amplifies connection to spirits. If hung, swings on its own. When rolling Sense, take a Bleed mark to get +2d.

4.name: Scales of Justice
4.effect: Safely measure bleed in an item. Roll Sense. Partial: general idea. Full: precise answer. Cannot take Bleed marks from a miss or mixed success.

4.name: Shadow Soap
4.effect: Scrubs the shadow off of anyone who uses it to wash. Effect wears off the dirtier a person becomes. Lasts no longer than one day.

4.name: Spectacles of True Sight
4.effect: See a person's true intentions with more clarity. Universally unfashionable. When rolling Read, take a Bleed mark to get +2d.

4.name: The Unbroken Band
4.effect: Ancient ring of protection. When wearer should take marks, can soak all by rolling 1d6. On 4-: take 1 Bleed. On 1: incapacitated and scarred.

4.name: The Whisper Point
4.effect: A needle to stitch a piece of your body onto another person's skin. Once complete, communicate across any distance. Both take 1 Body and 1 Bleed.

4.name: The Eye of Emrys
4.effect: Camera artifact that awakens the dead. Can also return them to natural state. Extremely dangerous and saturated with bleed.
